# Regular Shops (ID - Name)                                                                                                                                                |
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------#
# | 0 - Dali (Disc 1-4)             | 1 - Lindblum (Disc 1)           | 2 - Burmecia (Disc 1-4)       | 3 - Summit Station (Disc 2)  | 4 - Treno (Disc 2)                  |
# | 5 - Cleyra (Disc 2)             | 6 - Lindblum (Disc 2)           | 7 - Fossile Roo (Disc 2)      | 8 - Conde Petie (Disc 2-3)   | 9 - Black Mage Village (Disc 3)     |
# | 10 - Madain Sari (Disc 2-4)     | 11 - Alexandria (Disc 3-4)      | 12 - Treno (Disc 3-4)         | 13 - Lindblum (Disc 3-4)     | 14 - Oeilvert (Disc 3)              |
# | 15 - Esto Gaza (Disc 3)         | 16 - Ipsen's Castle (Disc 3-4)  | 17 - Daguerreo (Disc 3)       | 18 - Bran Bal (Disc 3)       | 19 - Daguerreo (Disc 4)             |
# | 20 - Black Mage Village (Disc 4)| 21 - Esto Gaza (Disc 3)         | 22 - Desert Palace (Disc 3)   | 23 - Unused 1                | 24 - Unused 2                       |
# | 25 - Item Shop 1 (Disc 1-4)     | 26 - Item Shop 2 (Disc 1-3)     | 27 - Item Shop 3 (Disc 2-3)   | 28 - Item Shop 4 (Disc 3-4)  | 29 - Item Shop 5 (Disc 3-4)         |
# | 30 - Item Shop 6 (Disc 4)       | 31 - Item Shop 7 (Zorn & Thorn) |                               |                              |                                     |
# -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------#
